.github/workflows/maven.yml.general_idea: Upgrade the Java version used in the CI pipeline from JDK 17 to JDK 21 to match the target runtime environment.
.github/workflows/maven.yml.why_exists: The application has been migrated to Java 21; running tests on JDK 17 may miss JDK 21-specific runtime behaviors or fail if the code relies on JDK 21 features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.2.1 to align with the Java 21 migration target.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+ and introduces breaking API changes (Jakarta EE namespace); staying on 2.6.x would prevent using Spring Boot 3 features and cause compatibility issues with other upgraded dependencies.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the managed Java version property to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures the project compiles against Java 21 language features and bytecode version; without this, the build might default to an older Java version or fail if strict compiler checks are enabled.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit management for Apache HttpClient 5 version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 and newer dependencies often rely on HttpClient 5; explicitly managing the version prevents transitive dependency conflicts or missing classes at runtime.

src/main/java/de/rieckpil/blog/WebSecuri.general_idea: Replace the deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with a bean-based SecurityFilterChain configuration.
src/main/java/de/rieckpil/blog/WebSecuri.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter was deprecated in Spring Security 5.7 and removed in Spring Security 6 (Spring Boot 3), causing a compile error if the class is extended.

src/main/java/de/rieckpil/blog/WebSecuri.general_idea: Replace the overridden configure method with a @Bean method returning SecurityFilterChain.
src/main/java/de/rieckpil/blog/WebSecuri.why_exists: The new Spring Security 6 model requires security configurations to be defined as beans returning SecurityFilterChain; the old @Override method signature is invalid in the new context.
src/main/java/de/rieckpil/blog/WebSecuri.before:
@Override
  protected void configure(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception {
src/main/java/de/rieckpil/blog/WebSecuri.after:
@Bean
  public SecurityFilterChain configure(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception {

src/main/java/de/rieckpil/blog/WebSecuri.general_idea: Replace authorizeRequests with authorizeHttpRequests to align with the new Spring Security API.
src/main/java/de/rieckpil/blog/WebSecuri.why_exists: authorizeRequests() was removed in Spring Security 6; using it causes a compile error as the method no longer exists on HttpSecurity.

src/main/java/de/rieckpil/blog/WebSecuri.general_idea: Replace mvcMatchers with requestMatchers to use the new request matching API.
src/main/java/de/rieckpil/blog/WebSecuri.why_exists: mvcMatchers() was removed in Spring Security 6; using it causes a compile error as the method no longer exists.

src/main/java/de/rieckpil/blog/WebSecuri.general_idea: Add return statement to build and return the SecurityFilterChain.
src/main/java/de/rieckpil/blog/WebSecuri.why_exists: The new @Bean method must return a SecurityFilterChain instance; omitting the return statement causes a compile error.

src/main/java/de/rieckpil/blog/customer/.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
src/main/java/de/rieckpil/blog/customer/.why_exists: The javax.persistence package was removed in Jakarta EE 9+; using it causes a compile-time 'package does not exist' error on JDK 17+ with Spring Boot 3.

src/test/java/de/rieckpil/blog/exercise1.general_idea: Replace deprecated @LocalServerPort with Environment property lookup to comply with Spring Boot 3.2+ API changes.
src/test/java/de/rieckpil/blog/exercise1.why_exists: Compile error: @LocalServerPort annotation was removed in Spring Boot 3.2.

src/test/java/de/rieckpil/blog/exercise1.general_idea: Update RemoteWebDriver constructor to use the new API signature required by Selenium 4.11+.
src/test/java/de/rieckpil/blog/exercise1.why_exists: Compile error: The old RemoteWebDriver constructor signature is removed in newer Selenium versions.

src/test/java/de/rieckpil/blog/exercise1.general_idea: Replace deprecated implicitlyWait(long, TimeUnit) with implicitlyWait(Duration) in Selenium WebDriver.
src/test/java/de/rieckpil/blog/exercise1.why_exists: Compile error: The TimeUnit-based implicitlyWait method is removed in Selenium 4.6+.

src/test/java/de/rieckpil/blog/exercise1.general_idea: Add --remote-allow-origins=* argument to ChromeOptions to fix Selenium 4.6+ remote connection restrictions.
src/test/java/de/rieckpil/blog/exercise1.why_exists: Runtime error: Selenium 4.6+ blocks remote connections by default unless this argument is provided.

src/test/java/de/rieckpil/blog/exercise1.general_idea: Replace deprecated @LocalServerPort with Environment injection to retrieve the random server port in Spring Boot 3.
src/test/java/de/rieckpil/blog/exercise1.why_exists: @LocalServerPort was removed in Spring Boot 3.0; using it causes a compilation error.

src/test/java/de/rieckpil/blog/exercise7.general_idea: Add explicit import of WebSecurityConfig to resolve missing bean definition in WebMvcTest context.
src/test/java/de/rieckpil/blog/exercise7.why_exists: Without this import, the test context fails to start because the SecurityFilterChain bean defined in WebSecurityConfig is not loaded, leading to a BeanCreationException or NoSuchBeanDefinitionException for security-related beans required by the controller.

src/test/java/de/rieckpil/blog/exercise7.general_idea: Import WebSecurityConfig to resolve missing security configuration in WebMvcTest context.
src/test/java/de/rieckpil/blog/exercise7.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x (and 2.7+) requires explicit import of SecurityFilterChain beans in @WebMvcTest slices, otherwise the test context fails to start due to missing security configuration.
